days.name: Easy Run ✓
days.description: 6 km @ 4:42/km. Done — first run back after kiting.

exercises.name: Easy run
exercises.how_to: Completed. Splits 5:01 → 4:34 — started easy, loosened up nicely.

days.name: Yasmin's Program
days.description: Full Ankle & Hips program. No run. Calf press → 30 kg, calf raise → 72.5 kg, leg press → 100 kg.

exercises.name: Leg press
exercises.how_to: Back to 100 kg — felt easy at 90 on Apr 2.

exercises.name: Calf press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Step up from 27.5 kg — you noted it felt easy and you were ready. Increase again next session if all 3 × 8 completed.

exercises.name: Single-leg seated calf raise
exercises.how_to: Up from 70 kg. Yasmin's rule is +1.25–2.5 kg per session (not +5). 72.5 kg today, 75 kg next if completed.

exercises.name: Cable hip abduction
exercises.how_to: Holding at 7.5 kg from Apr 2.

exercises.name: Seated hamstring curl
exercises.how_to: Slow controlled release. 1-second hold at peak.

exercises.name: Leg extension (single leg)
exercises.how_to: One leg at a time — not double leg.

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; knee tracks toes. Controlled descent.

exercises.name: Single-leg calf hops
exercises.how_to: Front foot on bench, single leg. Minimal ground contact — stay light and springy.

exercises.name: Pogo hops (single-leg)
exercises.how_to: Stop immediately if calf pain increases.

days.name: Rest
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Yasmin's Program
days.description: Full Ankle & Hips program. Calf press → 32.5 kg (if Tue 3×8 complete) else 30 kg. Calf raise → 75 kg.

exercises.name: Leg press
exercises.how_to: Full extension; controlled return.

exercises.name: Calf press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: 32.5 kg if you completed all 3 × 8 on Tuesday (felt hard but complete). Drop to 30 kg if sets were incomplete.

exercises.name: Single-leg seated calf raise
exercises.how_to: Up from 72.5 kg — felt easy on Tuesday. Increase to 77.5 kg next session if 3 × 8 completed today.

exercises.name: Cable hip abduction
exercises.how_to: Ankle cuff on lower cable. Outer leg to 45°.

exercises.name: Seated hamstring curl
exercises.how_to: Slow controlled release. 1-second hold at peak.

exercises.name: Leg extension (single leg)
exercises.how_to: Single leg only — not double. Full extension; controlled lowering.

exercises.how_to: Rear foot on box; knee tracks toes.

exercises.name: Single-leg calf hops
exercises.how_to: Front foot on bench, single leg. Minimal ground contact — stay light and springy.

exercises.name: Pogo hops (single-leg)
exercises.how_to: Stop if calf pain.

days.name: Long Run + Strides
days.description: 10 km @ 4:45/km with 4 × 20s strides @ 3:24/km, one every 2.5 km.

exercises.name: Long run
exercises.how_to: Comfortable aerobic pace throughout. HR 140–150.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Insert at km 2.5, 5, 7.5, and 10. Short and sharp — not all-out. Jog gently back to 4:45 before the next one.

days.name: Easy Run
days.description: 6 km @ 4:45/km. Easy — preserving freshness for Wednesday intervals.

exercises.name: Easy run
exercises.how_to: Conversational. Save the legs for tomorrow's intervals.

days.name: Intervals — 4 × 1000 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 4 × 1000 m @ 3:45/km (2 min jog recovery) + 2 km cooldown. ~9 km.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Easy jogging. Don't rush — calves need to be fully warm before the first rep.

exercises.name: Intervals
exercises.how_to: 2 min jog recovery between each rep. Consistent splits matter more than hitting pace exactly on rep 1. Stop if calf tightness builds during the session.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Let heart rate come down gradually.

days.name: Intervals — 4 × 1000 m
days.description: 2 km warmup + 4 × 1000 m @ 3:35/km (2 min jog recovery) + 2 km cooldown. ~9 km. Hardest session of the block.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Thorough warmup — don't rush. These are fast reps.

exercises.name: Intervals
exercises.how_to: 2 min jog recovery. Final quality session before race week — controlled but genuinely demanding. HR 170–180 on reps.

exercises.name: Cooldown
exercises.how_to: Easy jog. Let everything settle.

exercises.name: Long run
exercises.how_to: Comfortable aerobic pace. This is the long run peak.

exercises.name: Tempo insert
exercises.how_to: Harder than last week's tempo. Working hard but in control. Settle back to 4:45 immediately after.

days.name: Yasmin's Program (Light)
days.description: 2 sets each, weight −20%. Taper — don't add fatigue.

exercises.name: Leg press
exercises.how_to: Weight reduced 20% for taper. 2 sets only.

exercises.name: Calf press (Gastrocnemius)
exercises.how_to: Reduced weight. Taper.

exercises.name: Single-leg seated calf raise
exercises.how_to: Reduced weight. Taper.

exercises.name: Cable hip abduction
exercises.how_to: Standard.

exercises.name: Seated hamstring curl
exercises.how_to: Taper weight (~−20%).

exercises.name: Leg extension (single leg)
exercises.how_to: Taper weight.

exercises.name: Bulgarian split squat (Smith)
exercises.how_to: Taper weight.

exercises.name: Single-leg calf hops
exercises.how_to: Front foot on bench, single leg. Light and springy.

exercises.name: Pogo hops (single-leg)
exercises.how_to: Stop if calf pain.

days.name: Easy + Strides
days.description: 5 km @ 4:45/km + 4 × 20s strides @ 3:24/km. Keep legs firing.

exercises.name: Easy run
exercises.how_to: Very relaxed. Race is in 4 days. Just moving.

exercises.name: Strides
exercises.how_to: Race pace — sharp and fast. Full jog recovery between each. You should feel good and quick, not gassed.

days.name: Rest
days.description: Full rest.

days.name: Shakeout + Gym (Light)
days.description: 3 km very easy jog + 2 sets each, weight −20%.

exercises.name: Easy jog
exercises.how_to: Just to move the legs. HR should stay low. Two days to race.

exercises.name: Light gym
exercises.how_to: Same taper weights as Monday. Maintenance, not training. Keep it brief.

days.name: Rest — Race Prep
days.description: Rest. Prep race kit. Pin number on. Vaporflys out.

days.name: RACE — Battersea Park Run
days.description: sub-17:00. Target 3:24/km. Warm up 10 min easy + drills. Go get it.

exercises.name: Warmup
exercises.how_to: Don't skip — calves need it. Easy jog then leg swings, high knees, ankle circles. Arrive at the start warm.

exercises.name: Km 1
exercises.how_to: Should feel surprisingly easy. Resist the urge to go hard — you'll pay for it at km 3.

exercises.name: Km 2–4
exercises.how_to: Settle and hold. Relaxed arms, tall posture. Pick someone to chase.

exercises.name: Km 5
exercises.how_to: If there's anything left in the tank, use it now. The finish line is close.

days.name: Rest — Recovery
days.description: Rest and recover. Job done.
